verdict.rationale: The vault contains no value for gross logo churn; the Q4 2025 Operations Review explicitly states no quarterly gross logo churn metric was approved for this review cycle, and the customer appendix provides only customer counts (no churned-customer figure needed to compute it).
verdict.suggested_action: Ask Northstar's revenue operations team to provide the approved Q4 2025 gross logo churn calculation and its underlying churned-customer count before relying on the 3.1% figure.

evidence.span_text: No quarterly gross logo churn metric was approved for this review cycle.
